title: crotalaria uncinella subsp. uncinella
intro: Crotalaria uncinella subsp. uncinella, also known as the prickly rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria uncinella subsp. uncinella include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to treat skin conditions and wounds. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and the seeds are used to make herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures.
